action.reasoning: Observation: Previous iteration failed due to inspect module name clash. TripoSR render method signature indicates it cannot accept custom cameras. Need to understand internal ray computation to render from target camera poses. Analysis: The renderer has a _forward method that takes rays_o, rays_d. I can extract triplane from input image and then compute rays for each target camera to render. Decision: Write explore.py to inspect TSR system internals (render method, camera creation) to learn coordinate system and ray generation, then update predict.py accordingly. Then test on a single val object and submit eval for baseline LPIPS.
